// Fixture for .github/ci/check-forbidden-imports.sh self-test (Phase 11 §P0.10.9)
//
// This file deliberately contains EVERY forbidden import pattern the script
// is supposed to catch. The `--self-test` flag of the grep script points at
// this file and asserts the script reports all 4 violations; if it does not,
// the script's regexes have regressed and CI fails before any real run.
//
// File extension is .txt (not .kt) so IntelliJ does not try to index it as
// Kotlin source. The .github/ directory is outside any Gradle source set
// root, so Gradle does not compile it either.
//
// DO NOT use this as actual code — it imports Material Icons / Material 3
// TopAppBar which are forbidden in feature modules and primitive components.

package fixture

// 1) Material Icons — direct import (forbidden)
import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons

// 1b) Material Icons — aliased (forbidden, must still trigger)
import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.Home as HomeIcon

// 2) Material Icons — wildcard (forbidden)
import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.*

// 3) Material 3 TopAppBar family — direct (forbidden in feature-*)
import androidx.compose.material3.TopAppBar
import androidx.compose.material3.MediumTopAppBar
import androidx.compose.material3.LargeTopAppBar
import androidx.compose.material3.CenterAlignedTopAppBar

// 3b) Material 3 TopAppBar family — aliased (forbidden, must still trigger)
import androidx.compose.material3.MediumTopAppBar as M3Bar

// 4) Material 3 wildcard import in feature module (forbidden)
import androidx.compose.material3.*
